case_title: ZOILO MARIANO DIAZ VS. BEATRICE KUSHNER ET AL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-06-2023 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR TRIAL CONTINUANCE. JONATHAN TELLER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT BEATRICE KUSHNER VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/25/23 IS CONTINUED TO 1/22/24 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PARTIES MUST E-MAIL DEPARTMENT206@SFTC.ORG NO LATER THAN SIX WEEKS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE TO SET A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED AND MOVING PARTY TO DOWNLOAD AND SERVE THE ORDER. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
